description: Export the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake from the local SeisComP MariaDB database into a standards-compliant FDSN QuakeML 1.2 XML file at ~/exports/noto_quakeml.xml. The file must include the event's origin (latitude, longitude, and depth) and magnitude, utilizing the FDSN QuakeML namespaces ('http://quakeml.org/xmlns/quakeml/1.2' and 'http://quakeml.org/xmlns/bed/1.2'). The XML structure must feature a <quakeml> root element containing an <eventParameters> element.
